source.name: OS X Mountain Lion 10.8 installer image from Internet Archive macOS-X-images

entries.name: Apple Mac mini Unibody No Optical

note: Applications and System Preferences panes were extracted from Essentials.pkg in the OS X Mountain Lion 10.8 installer image. Pane entries prefer NSPrefPaneIconFile/declared pane artwork instead of generic .prefPane document icons; CoreTypes resources still come from the Base System image.
